title: psychanthus comptus
intro: Psychanthus comptus, also known as East Indian or Ceylonese root, is a type of plant that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of lignans and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Psychanthus comptus include its ability to act as a natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Psychanthus comptus can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health issues.
